query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 'Already send_ready'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 'Named — needs email verification'
    WHEN COUNT(c.id) > 0 THEN 'LLM-inferred only — needs name verification'
    ELSE 'No contacts at all'
  END AS readinessBucket,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS projectCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.priority = 'hot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hotProjects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.priority = 'warm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warmProjects
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY sendReady DESC;
